flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 21% at Lasell University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (1.2k vs 1.5k).

flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Lasell University fell 12% between 2021 and 2024 (60.7% → 53.7%).
